title: 'Bourne 5' Gets Update From Matt Damon 10 Years After Last Action Sequel

blocks.content: It’s now been a decade since last we saw one of the action genre’s best heroes, Jason Bourne, disappear following another explosive, conspiracy-laden adventure. While there have been rumors and reports regarding a sequel in the time since, the elusive assassin remains missing in action. Well, Bourne actor Matt Damon has now offered an update on the fate of Bourne 5 (not including the spin-off), and it certainly sounds like we haven’t seen the last of the amnesiac hitman.

Damon first played Jason Bourne and altered the trajectory of both his own career and modern action moviemaking in 2002’s The Bourne Identity. Introducing a mysterious man with no memory of his past who slowly unravels his violent history as a government assassin, the first movie and its sequels, 2004’s The Bourne Supremacy and 2007’s The Bourne Ultimatum, were each met with critical acclaim and have since become renowned as one of the greatest action trilogies ever made.

An arguably underrated Jeremy Renner-led spin-off, The Bourne Legacy, was released in 2012, with the last time audiences saw Bourne himself being in 2016’s Jason Bourne, which was sadly not as revered as its predecessors. Largely a lesser retread of what came before and failing to add anything new, the prospect and potential of Bourne 5 is boundless, with Damon now confirming that the sequel is something that’s actively being worked on (via Parade).

"We're always looking to try to get another one of those because we loved it, everyone who worked on them. So there's always some attempt going on to write, to come up with a new story. So if you have anything, let us know."

The Bourne franchise remains hugely popular, and after some push and pull surrounding the rights to the IP, NBCUniversal emerged victorious and now owns all rights to both the "Bourne" and "Treadstone" books. Which means they can expand and continue the franchise on both the big and small screens in whatever way they wish. However, based on Damon's update, it seems there is currently no plan in place regarding what to do with the franchise's next chapter.

While word of a sequel has been as secret and shady as a Bourne-style assassination, ongoing rumors have claimed that Academy Award-winning director Edward Berger is being eyed to take the helm of the next Jason Bourne sequel, with a potential title, The Bourne Dilemma, having also been revealed. Though this could simply be a clever joke regarding the lack of current creative direction. While this is currently just speculation, Damon himself has given Berger his seal of approval, calling him “a great director” and confirming that the filmmaker does have an idea in mind for the next mission.

Before finally working out exactly what he wants to do with Bourne 5, Matt Damon will next return to the big screen as Odysseus in Oscar-winning director Christopher Nolan’s fantasy action epic, The Odyssey, which is due to land in theaters on July 17, 2026.
